description.en-US: Aquinas's commentary on Aristotle's *Meteorologica* — meteorological and atmospheric phenomena. Unfinished — Aquinas covered only Books I and part of II.
description.la: Expositio *Meteorologicorum* Aristotelis — de phaenomenis meteorologicis et atmosphaericis. Opus inchoatum — solum Librum I et partem II tractavit.

sources.description: Mirrored via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
Latin Leonine / Marietti edition (public domain), mirrored from dhspriory.org via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
